zh.lifeSummary: 當John - Iain Mackintosh於1295年出生在蘇格蘭時，他的父親Angus MacFerquhard Mackintosh 6th Chief Mackintosh, 7th Chief Chattan31歲，母親Eva NicDhùghall Heretrix of Chattan26歲。他於1320年之前與Mrs. Ian MacKintosh在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於大約1360年享年66歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John - Iain Mackintosh于1295年出生在苏格兰时，他的父亲Angus MacFerquhard Mackintosh 6th Chief Mackintosh, 7th Chief Chattan31岁，母亲Eva NicDhùghall Heretrix of Chattan26岁。他于1320年之前与Mrs. Ian MacKintosh在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于大约1360年享年66岁。

nameMeanings.name: Mackintosh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: McIntosh
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac an Toisich ‘son of the chief’. Compare Mackintosh .

History: Clan Mackintosh is a Highland Scottish clan claiming descent from Shaw McDuff, a 12th-century chief (second son of Duncan, Earl of Fife), who established the traditional family seat at Perry, Morays. The chiefs of Clan Mackintosh have been regarded as leaders of the Chattan Confederation since 1291.

nameMeanings.name: John

nameMeanings.name: Iain
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When John - Iain Mackintosh was born in 1295, in Scotland, his father, Angus MacFerquhard Mackintosh 6th Chief Mackintosh, 7th Chief Chattan, was 31 and his mother, Eva NicDhùghall Heretrix of Chattan, was 26. He married Mrs. Ian MacKintosh before 1320, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died about 1360, at the age of 66.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John - Iain Mackintosh est né en 1295, à Écosse, son père, Angus MacFerquhard Mackintosh 6th Chief Mackintosh, 7th Chief Chattan, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Eva NicDhùghall Heretrix of Chattan, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Mrs. Ian MacKintosh avant 1320, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé environ 1360, à l’âge de 66 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John - Iain Mackintosh 1295 in Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Angus MacFerquhard Mackintosh 6th Chief Mackintosh, 7th Chief Chattan 31 und seine Mutter Eva NicDhùghall Heretrix of Chattan 26. Er hat vor 1320 in Scotland Mrs. Ian MacKintosh geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb um 1360 im Alter von 66 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John - Iain Mackintosh è nato il nel 1295 nel Scotland, il suo padre, Angus MacFerquhard Mackintosh 6th Chief Mackintosh, 7th Chief Chattan, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Eva NicDhùghall Heretrix of Chattan, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Mrs. Ian MacKintosh prima del 1320, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì circa 1360, all'età di 66 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John - Iain Mackintoshが1295年にスコットランドで生まれた時，父Angus MacFerquhard Mackintosh 6th Chief Mackintosh, 7th Chief Chattanは31歳，母Eva NicDhùghall Heretrix of Chattanは26歳であった。1320年以前にスコットランドでMrs. Ian MacKintoshと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は約1360年に66歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John - Iain Mackintosh(이)가 1295년 스컷랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Angus MacFerquhard Mackintosh 6th Chief Mackintosh, 7th Chief Chattan(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Eva NicDhùghall Heretrix of Chattan(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1320년 이전 스컷랜드에서 Mrs. Ian MacKintosh(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1360년 66세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John - Iain Mackintosh nasceu em 1295, em Scotland, seu pai, Angus MacFerquhard Mackintosh 6th Chief Mackintosh, 7th Chief Chattan, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Eva NicDhùghall Heretrix of Chattan, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Mrs. Ian MacKintosh antes 1320, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1360, com 66 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John - Iain Mackintosh родился в 1295 г. в местности Шотландия, его отцу по имени Angus MacFerquhard Mackintosh 6th Chief Mackintosh, 7th Chief Chattan было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Eva NicDhùghall Heretrix of Chattan, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs. Ian MacKintosh перед 1320 г. в местности Шотландия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер около 1360 г. в возрасте 66 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John - Iain Mackintosh nació en 1295, en Scotland, su papá, Angus MacFerquhard Mackintosh 6th Chief Mackintosh, 7th Chief Chattan, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Eva NicDhùghall Heretrix of Chattan, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Mrs. Ian MacKintosh antes de 1320, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió aproximadamente 1360, a la edad de 66 años.
